functions.name: MetadataFor
functions.signature: func MetadataFor(name string, localPath string, remoteURL string) (Metadata, error)
functions.doc: returns canonical repository metadata using remote-first identity

functions.name: NormalizeRemoteURL
functions.doc: normalizes SSH and HTTPS git remotes into canonical HTTPS

functions.name: RepoSlugFromRemoteURL
functions.doc: returns org/repo slug from a remote URL

functions.name: CanonicalRepositoryID
functions.signature: func CanonicalRepositoryID(remoteURL string, localPath string) (string, error)
functions.doc: returns the canonical repository identifier hashed from remote URL or local path

key_invariants: CanonicalRepositoryID requires non-empty localPath when remoteURL is absent
NormalizeRemoteURL: lowercases host and path, strips trailing .git and trailing slashes
SSH git@host:org/repo.git and HTTPS https://host/org/repo.git collapse to same canonical form
SHA-1 truncated to 8 hex chars - identity-stable, not cryptographically authoritative
localPath resolved via filepath.Abs in MetadataFor
ID prefix is repository:r_ not just a raw hash
